hypothesis: If chemical articles are preprocessed into structure-preserving markdown with inserted GPT-4o image captions before a single-agent LLM extracts fields, then per-column precision/recall/F1 on ChemX nanozyme and chelate-complex datasets will exceed those of baseline LLMs, a general-purpose agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems because structure-aware and multimodal preprocessing reduces parsing errors and information loss in end-to-end extraction.
